title: deyeuxia filiformis var. aristata
intro: Deyeuxia filiformis var. aristata, also known as aristate needle grass, is a type of grass native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of aristate needle grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or made into a poultice to treat various ailments.
